⚡ Taming the JVM

Home / Docs / Presenter Guide

Presenter Guide

Slide-by-slide speaker notes for all 54 slides, demo timing reference, day-before checklist, and troubleshooting for every known failure mode.

Open Slides → View on GitHub ↗

Before You Present

  • Pull latest demo images (Grafana LGTM, Prometheus)
  • Run Demo 01, 02, 03 end-to-end
  • Verify Grafana loads at localhost:3000
  • Confirm histogram config in Demo 02 application.properties
  • Set terminal font to 18pt minimum
  • Disable notifications, close non-essential apps

60-Minute Core Timing

Opening + Agenda3 min
§01 Heap (+ Demo 01)8 min
§02 Right-Sizing5 min
§03 GC (+ Demo 02)8 min
§04 Startup (+ Demo 03)7 min
§05–07 + Takeaways + Q&A22 min
Talk structure: 30 core slides for a 60-minute session · 24 bonus slides for a 90-minute extended session · 3 live demos in the core · 6 additional demos in the bonus content. Press S in the Reveal.js slides to open speaker notes.

Talk

Taming the JVM: Optimizing Java Workloads on OpenShift & Kubernetes

Quarkus 3.33.1 LTS  ·  Java 21 & 25

Based On

📗 Optimizing Cloud Native Java (O'Reilly)

📗 SRE with Java Microservices (O'Reilly)
